lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Pst, wanna hear a secret?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: They're not normal!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Strange Old Man, I was wondering if I could ask a favour of you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Currently when I'm trying to go plundering the catacombs here, my mind is plagued by several inconvenient warnings about the dangers below.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering, do you know of a way to condense these warnings into a single condensed one?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: AAAAAAAAARRRRRRGGGGGHHHHHHHH?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, you'll have that arranged for me? Thanks a lot, Strange Old Man!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Strange Old Man, thanks for having those mental warnings I was having condensed into a single one, but I miss having them seperated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there any chance you'd be willing to change it back for me?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: AAAAAAAAARRRRRRGGGGGHHHHHHHH?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow, you'll have that arranged for me? Thanks a lot, Strange Old Man!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Knock knock.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who's there?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: A big scary monster HAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHAHA!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll leave you to it then...

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: AAAAAAAAARRRRRRGGGGGHHHHHHHH!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's wrong?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: AAAAAAAAARRRRRRGGGGGHHHHHHHH!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: What? I didn't ask for a book!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Dig, dig, dig.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Pst, wanna hear a secret?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Knock knock.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: AAAAAAAAARRRRRRGGGGGHHHHHHHH!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: What? I didn't ask for a book!

sections.title: Talking to him without the Strange icon

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Icon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have it yet.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Slow! No slow! Only fast! Fast dig! Dig, dig, dig!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I'll be back soon.

sections.title: Talking to him after obtaining the strange icon

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Icon?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have it here.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: At last! Quick! Give it!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: You did it! Now for me.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: It's all little bits now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? But why? I thought you needed it!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Yes! Needed it for him, but not to keep! His friend asked him to protect it, but he made a new plan, a better plan!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What are you on about?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: The old plan is gone. We're not doing it that way. His friend won't be happy, but it was for the best!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Now we're doing it his way...

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Anyway, job well done! Still more digging though. Always dig. Dig, dig, dig!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Oh, and don't forget your prize! He made it very clear you had to have a prize!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks... I guess.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: It's time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Time for what?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Time to dig. To dig, dig, dig. But no normal dig. We now have new purpose!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What do you mean? What purpose?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: The brothers six! Dutiful servants of Saradomin... At least, that's what they'd tell you! Ha! Not so. Not so.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: They made a pact you see! Strength in life for servitude in death.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Servitude?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Yes! They guard it for him! That was their purpose, but that time is up now. He wants it back! You can get it! You can dig!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You want me to bring you something?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: The icon! He needs it now! You must dig, dig dig. Slay the brothers six! It's okay, it won't hurt them... much. The icon will be in the chest!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right... So you want me to go and kill the six brothers and bring you back an icon?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Yes! Do this! Do this! Maybe little prize for you if you do. But first you must dig! Dig, dig, dig!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me more about the brothers?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: The brothers? His faithful servants! Book tell you more! Take it! I don't even want it!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: The brothers? His faithful servants! Book tell you more! Read it! Read it!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I wanted to ask you about warnings.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Yes?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Currently when I'm trying to go plundering the catacombs here, my mind is plagued by several inconvenient warnings about the dangers below.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I was wondering, do you know of a way to condense these warnings into a single one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for having those mental warnings I was having condensed into a single one, but I miss having them seperated.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Is there any chance you'd be willing to change it back for me?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: AAAAAAAAARRRRRRGGGGGHHHHHHHH!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm guessing that was a yes? In that case, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll be back soon.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Please enter the answer to the question.

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: How can that be? Try again!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Spot on!

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Strange Old Man
lines.text: I need you to answer this for me.
